title: LEGAL AID SERVICES OF OREGON INTIMATE PARTNER VIOLENCE - 211info
text: GATEWAY CENTER FOR DOMESTIC VIOLENCE SERVICES LEGAL AID SERVICES OF OREGON INTIMATE PARTNER VIOLENCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides legal advice and representation on domestic abuse and family law matters. Information available in regard to immigration, public benefits, tenant/landlord disputes, discrimination law, and contested restraining orders. 10305 E Burnside Street Portland, OR 97216 Eligibility: Survivors of intimate partner violence and/or sexual assault Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-4pm Email (503) 988-6400 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 988-6400 Main phone Main phone (503) 988-6400 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information or services. No walk-ins. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Clackamas and Multnomah Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet MAX Blue line and buses 15, 20, 287 Services: Benefits and Services Assistance * Public Assistance Issues Domestic/Family Violence Legal Services Immigration/Naturalization Legal Services * Domestic Violence Issues Tenant Rights Information/Counseling * Domestic Violence Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: INFORMATION SERVICES - INTIMATE PARTNER VIOLENCE ADVOCACY AND SUPPORT LEGAL SERVICES - PROSECUTION FOR SURVIVORS PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - SELF-SUFFICIENCY SERVICES SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - ALCOHOL AND DRUG COUNSELING AND ADVOCACY If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. GATEWAY CENTER FOR DOMESTIC VIOLENCE SERVICES
